ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_type" INTEGER /* Type of game (e.g., tournament game, online game) */,
  "game_format" INTEGER /* Format of the game (e.g., blitz, standard) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "white_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the white player */,
  "black_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the black player */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the game started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the game ended */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event or tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number in the event (if applicable) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., in-progress, completed, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_type FOREIGN KEY ("game_type") REFERENCES game_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_white_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("white_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_format FOREIGN KEY ("game_format") REFERENCES game_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_black_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("black_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the move belongs to */,
  "move_number" INTEGER /* Move number in the game */,
  "move" TEXT /* Move notation (e.g., e4) */,
  "white_time" TEXT /* Time taken by the white player */,
  "white_eval" TEXT /* Evaluation of the move by the white player */,
  "black_time" TEXT /* Time taken by the black player */,
  "black_eval" TEXT /* Evaluation of the move by the black player */,
  "move_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the move was made */,
  "move_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the move (time taken to make the move) */,
  "move_engine_evaluation" TEXT /* Evaluation of the move by a chess engine */,
  "move_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "federation" TEXT /* Chess federation the player is affiliated with */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game type */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game type is online */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the game format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game format */,
  "time_control" TEXT /* Time control for the game format (e.g., 30+0, 5+2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game summary */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the summary belongs to */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the game */,
  "summary_author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the summary */,
  "summary_date" TEXT /* Date when the summary was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_summaries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_summaries_summary_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("summary_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move analysis */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the move the analysis belongs to */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Analysis of the move */,
  "analysis_author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_analyses_analysis_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_analyses_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator, data scientist) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the access event belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the game */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game outcome */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the outcome belongs to */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move prediction */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the move the prediction belongs to */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction of the move */,
  "prediction_author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_predictions_prediction_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_predictions_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the rating belongs to */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the game */,
  "rating_author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_rating_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game history */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the history belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the history belongs to */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date when the game history was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_history_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
